quiz.question:
White brought their king closer to the center with Ke3.

Our general plan is to also activate our king, perhaps to f6. 

How should we execute this plan?

answers.text: Since we are up a healthy pawn, we'll offer a rook trade with ...Rd7. If White doesn't trade, ...Kg7 and ...Kf6 is next.

feedback.text: Good job! That's the best plan here.

distractors.text: It is important to keep the rooks on the board, and we can play ...Kg7 to f6 immediately. With more pieces on the board and a pawn up our chances to win are higher.

feedback.text: ...Kg7 immediately looses to Nxe6+ fork! The f7-pawn is pinned.
